content.text:
The Pro Expense app is open and showing its main Home dashboard. There were no intro pages to clear. The screen shows:
- "Home" title at the top
- Totals section with Income (0 USD) and Outcome (25.5 USD)
- "Expenses in this Week" chart (APR 26 - MAY 3)
- Recent transaction (Today 12:30 AM, 25.5 USD)
- A "+" floating action button
